description.zh-Hans: 生成交错排列的硬边鱼鳞/龙鳞材质，每片鳞片具有盾形轮廓、顶部高光、侧边反光和底部叠压阴影。
description.en: Generates staggered hard-edge fish or dragon scales with shield silhouettes, top highlights, side glints, and overlapping lower shadows.

triggers.zh-Hans: 鳞片, 蛇鳞, 鱼鳞, 龙鳞, 六边形, 动物纹理
triggers.en: scales, snake scales, fish scales, dragon scales, hexagonal, animal texture

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成鱼鳞或蛇鳞图案纹理，带3D立体交叠效果，可用于角色装备生物纹理。
exampleUsage.en: Generates fish or snake scale patterns with 3D overlapping effect for character armor or creature textures.
